generateHighFidelityStub.signature: generateHighFidelityStub(exportDef: {name: string, type: string, signature: string}, options?: {language?: string}): string
generateHighFidelityStub.description: Generates a high-fidelity stub with realistic return values from type signature, JSDoc types, and RAPID-STUB marker comment

generateGroupStubs.signature: generateGroupStubs(cwd: string, groupId: string, allGroups: Array, contracts: Array): Promise<{files: string[], report: string}>
generateGroupStubs.description: Generates stubs for all cross-group dependencies that a given group needs from other groups

scaffoldVerifyStubs.description: CLI subcommand that reports which stubs have been replaced by real implementations and which remain

foundationSetLifecycle.description: Creates a foundational set #0 with foundation:true flag in DAG, containing shared interfaces and stubs

scaffoldReportV2.signature: scaffold-report.json: { ...v1, groups: object, stubs: string[], foundationSet?: string }
scaffoldReportV2.description: Extended scaffold-report.json with groups, stub file locations, and optional foundationSet designation

stubAutoResolve.description: Detects RAPID-STUB marker in file content for auto-resolution during merge (stub yields to real implementation)

partitionIntoGroups.signature: partitionIntoGroups(dag: DAGv3, contracts: Array<Contract>, numDevelopers: number): { groups: Array, crossGroupEdges: Array }
partitionIntoGroups.description: Needs group partitioning to know which sets belong to which developer groups for stub generation

annotateDAGWithGroups.description: Needs DAG annotation to write group assignments into DAG.json after scaffold completes

stubMarkerInvariant.description: Every generated stub file must contain the exact string '// RAPID-STUB' (or language-appropriate comment equivalent) on its first line for merge auto-resolution

stubReplacementSafety.description: scaffold verify-stubs must accurately report replacement status by checking if file content still contains the RAPID-STUB marker

foundationSetMinimality.description: Foundation set #0 scope must be limited to interfaces and stubs only -- no feature implementation logic allowed in the foundation set

stubContentIsolation.description: Stub files generated in the .rapid-stubs/ directory must not include any implementation logic beyond return value scaffolding

definition.scope: Overhaul the scaffold system for multi-developer workflows: group-aware set splitting, high-fidelity stub generation with realistic return values and RAPID-STUB markers, shared stub branch management, optional foundational set #0, stub lifecycle hooks, and scaffold-report v2.

tasks.description: Implement generateHighFidelityStub() with realistic return values from CONTRACT.json type signatures and RAPID-STUB marker
tasks.acceptance: Generated stubs include JSDoc types, realistic return values, and RAPID-STUB marker on first line

tasks.description: Implement generateGroupStubs() for cross-group dependency stubs
tasks.acceptance: Stubs generated for all imports a group needs from other groups

tasks.description: Implement per-worktree stub directory management (.rapid-stubs/ generation and cleanup)
tasks.acceptance: Worktrees generate stubs in .rapid-stubs/ from CONTRACT.json; stubs replaced by real implementations during merge

tasks.description: Implement foundational set #0 with foundation:true DAG flag and scope constraints
tasks.acceptance: Foundation set created with DAG annotation; start-set checks DAG dependencies for foundation requirement
Command accurately reports stub replacement status across all groups

tasks.description: Add RAPID-STUB auto-resolution rule to merge.cjs
tasks.acceptance: Merge pipeline auto-resolves conflicts where one side is a stub and the other is a real implementation

tasks.description: Extend scaffold-report.json with v2 fields (groups, stubs, foundationSet)
tasks.acceptance: Scaffold report includes group assignments, stub file paths, and optional foundation set designation

acceptance: High-fidelity stubs generated with correct return types
Cross-group stub generation works for multi-group projects
Merge auto-resolution works for stub-to-real conflicts
